_comment: Per-company ILS point overrides for triage_jobspy_csv.estimate_ils. Keys are lowercase substrings checked via `key in company.lower()`. First match wins (insertion order). Companies with conditional logic (travel penalty, JD-comp lookup, JD-body OR clauses) stay hardcoded in triage_jobspy_csv.py — see the 'complex per-company' section there. See docs/reference_ils_scoring_model.md for the model these overrides snapshot.

crowdstrike.note: Falcon cloud SWE-heavy bar; cyber screener; preferred intel/cyber bullet; cold apply

ifit.note: CLT contract; thin comp visibility; gig-like posture

wissen.note: Strong SDET signal; consulting + 10yr AVP bar; hybrid not remote

taulia.note: Director-scope Principal QE; 12+ yr bar; remote not guaranteed in JD

hyland.note: US remote; medical imaging stack; cold apply

abbvie.note: Plant CSV/regulated manufacturing; onsite plant culture

quva.note: Pharma validation QA; NJ site posture; no clear WFH in JD

tram.note: Automotive warranty plant track; Plymouth MI implied onsite

yeti.note: Bozeman HQ product/manufacturing QA; intl travel
